hero.titleBefore: All your money in one place with
hero.description: Track expenses, budgets, recurring bills, and investments (stocks & crypto) with clear insights and real-time prices.

features.heading: Everything you need to manage money—beautifully
features.description: From daily spending to long-term investing, stay in control with one simple app.

items.title: Recurring bills & subscriptions
items.desc: Never miss a payment with automatic tracking and reminders.

items.title: Investment tracking
items.desc: Monitor stocks and crypto with live prices and performance.

items.title: Net worth & accounts
items.desc: A unified view across cash, cards, brokerage, and wallets.

items.title: Smart budgeting
items.desc: Monthly limits, rollover rules, and category targets that guide decisions.

items.title: Auto-categorization
items.desc: Rules and suggestions that get smarter over time.

items.title: Multi-currency
items.desc: Track accounts across currencies with automatic conversions.

cta.heading: Ready to take control of your money?
cta.description: Simple setup, instant clarity, and one place for everything—spending, bills, and investments.

steps.title: Connect or import
steps.desc: Link banks/brokerages where available, or import CSVs and crypto wallets.

steps.title: Categorize & set goals
steps.desc: Automatic suggestions, custom categories, and monthly targets.

steps.title: Track & grow
steps.desc: Stay on budget, monitor investments, and optimize.

items.a: Yes. You can start on the Free plan and upgrade anytime.

items.q: Do you support bank and brokerage connections?
items.a: In select regions. Otherwise you can import CSVs and add transactions manually.

items.q: How are stock and crypto prices updated?
items.a: We fetch regular price updates from reliable market data providers.

items.q: How do you handle security and privacy?
items.a: We follow industry best practices. Your data is encrypted and exportable anytime.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies to make this site work and analytics cookies to understand usage.

sections.title: 1. What are cookies
body: Cookies are small text files that websites or apps send to a user’s device, where they are stored and later sent back to the same sites/apps upon subsequent visits. They help improve the experience, analyze service performance, and in some cases offer personalized content.

sections.title: 2. Types of cookies used
body: Technical (necessary) cookies
These cookies are essential for the proper operation of the app and do not require user consent.
Examples: authentication, preference storage, security.
Analytics (optional) cookies
Collect anonymous, aggregated information about app usage, e.g., how many users and which features are used.
Used to improve the services offered.
Profiling/marketing (optional, if used) cookies
Used to build user profiles and show personalized content or ads.
buddyBudget does not currently use direct profiling cookies. If introduced in the future, explicit consent will be requested.

sections.title: 3. Cookie duration
body: Session cookies: automatically deleted when the app or browser is closed.
Persistent cookies: remain on the device until their expiration or manual deletion by the user.

sections.title: 4. Consent management
body: On first access, a banner is shown to allow the user to accept or reject non-essential cookies.
The user can change preferences at any time from the app settings or delete cookies from their browser/device.

sections.title: 5. Third-party cookies
body: Some features may use external services (e.g., Google Analytics, hosting, open banking integrations). These providers may set their own cookies. For more information, refer to the providers’ policies.

sections.title: 6. Managing cookies in your browser
body: You can configure your browser to refuse or delete cookies, following the guidance provided by vendors:
Chrome: https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/61416?hl=en
Safari: https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201265
Firefox: https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/cookies-information-websites-store-on-your-computer
Edge: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/delete-cookies-in-microsoft-edge-63947406-40ac-c3b8-57b9-2a946a29ae09

sections.title: 7. Updates to this Cookie Policy
body: We reserve the right to update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes to cookies used or regulatory obligations. Changes will be communicated via the app or website.

sections.title: 8. Contact
body: For questions about the use of cookies: support@buddybudget.app

sections.title: 1. Introduction
body: Welcome to buddyBudget, the application that helps you track personal expenses, accounts, and investments.
By using buddyBudget, you agree to these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part, please do not use the app.

sections.title: 2. Definitions
body: "Service": the buddyBudget app and all of its features.
"User": the person using the app.
"Content": data, information, and materials uploaded or generated by the user through the app.

sections.title: 3. Permitted Use
body: The app is intended for adult users only (18+).
It is prohibited to use buddyBudget for illegal purposes or in a way that compromises the operation of the Service.
The User agrees to provide accurate data and not to share their account with third parties.

sections.title: 4. Registration and Account
body: Creating an account may be required to use all features.
The User is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials and for all activities carried out through their account.
buddyBudget may suspend or close an account in case of violations of the Terms.

sections.title: 5. Services Provided
body: buddyBudget provides tools to record and view personal expenses, income, accounts, and investments.
The Service is for informational and management purposes only.
buddyBudget is not a bank, financial intermediary, or licensed advisor. Analyses and calculations are indicative only and do not constitute financial, legal, or tax advice.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
body: buddyBudget and its contents (code, design, trademark) are the exclusive property of [your company/name].
The User is granted a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license for personal use of the app.

sections.title: 7. User Content
body: Data entered by Users remains their property.
The User grants buddyBudget a limited license to process the data solely to provide the Service.
It is the User’s responsibility to ensure the accuracy of the data entered.

sections.title: 8. Limitations of Liability
body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available".
buddyBudget does not guarantee the absence of errors or interruptions.
buddyBudget is not responsible for financial decisions, losses, or damages resulting from the use of information generated by the app.

sections.title: 9. Privacy and Data Protection
body: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with our Privacy Policy, available in the app/website.
buddyBudget implements security measures to protect data, but the User acknowledges that no system is completely secure.

sections.title: 10. Changes to the Terms
body: buddyBudget reserves the right to modify the Terms at any time.
Changes will be communicated to Users through the app or the website.
By continuing to use the Service after changes are published, the User accepts the new Terms.

sections.title: 11. Term and Termination
body: The Terms remain in effect until the account is closed by the User or by buddyBudget.
buddyBudget may suspend or terminate the Service in case of abuse or violation of the Terms.

sections.title: 12. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
body: These Terms are governed by Italian law.
For any dispute, the court of the consumer’s place of residence or domicile shall have jurisdiction.

sections.title: 13. Contact
body: For questions about these Terms of Service, you can contact us via the official email address indicated in the app or on the website.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
body: This policy describes how buddyBudget (operated by [your company or your name], located at [address], email: [your email]) collects, uses, and protects users’ personal data.

sections.title: 2. What data we collect
body: By using buddyBudget, we may collect the following categories of data:
Registration data: name, email, login credentials.
Financial data entered by the user: expenses, income, investments, bank accounts only if manually entered by the user.
Technical data: device information, IP address, app usage logs.
Support data: messages sent to our customer support.
Important note: buddyBudget does not have direct access to a user’s bank accounts unless a connection with third-party providers (e.g., open banking) is explicitly enabled.

sections.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
body: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
Provide and improve the Service (legal basis: contract performance).
Enable the user to track expenses, income, and investments (legal basis: contract performance).
Handle support requests (legal basis: contract performance).
Send communications related to the Service (legal basis: legitimate interest).
Comply with legal obligations (legal basis: legal obligation).

sections.title: 4. Data retention
body: Data is retained as long as the account remains active.
If the account is deleted, data is erased or anonymized within [X months].
Some data may be retained longer if required by legal obligations.

sections.title: 5. Data sharing
body: We do not sell or transfer personal data to third parties. Data may be shared with:
Service providers (hosting, cloud, technical analytics).
Competent authorities, if required by law.

sections.title: 6. Data security
body: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect data (e.g., encryption, backups, controlled access). However, no system is completely secure.

sections.title: 7. Users’ rights
body: Under the GDPR, users have the right to:
Access their data.
Rectify inaccurate data.
Request erasure ("right to be forgotten").
Restrict processing.
Request data portability.
Object to processing.
Requests can be sent via the official email address indicated in the app or on the website.

sections.title: 8. International transfers
body: If data is processed outside the European Economic Area (e.g., cloud servers), we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place (e.g., Standard Contractual Clauses).

sections.title: 9. Children
body: The Service is not intended for individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

sections.title: 10. Changes to this policy
body: We reserve the right to update this policy. If that happens, we will notify users via the app or website.

sections.title: 11. Contact
body: For any questions or to exercise your rights, you can contact us via the official email and address indicated in the app or on the website.
